evals.name: arxiv-mamba
evals.prompt:
hey can you add this paper to the datahub registry? https://arxiv.org/abs/2312.00752

Save the resulting record JSON to <OUTPUT_DIR>/record.json so I can review it. Don't actually try to open a PR — the repo isn't set up yet, just produce the record and tell me what would happen next.
evals.expected_output: A single JSON record matching the dataland long-key schema for the Mamba paper. Should have task ~ 'Sequence Modeling' (or similar reasonable choice), ai_system likely 'model' (state-space model), architecture mentioning 'State Space', organization 'Carnegie Mellon University' or 'Princeton' (the authors' affiliations), year 2023, source_url 'https://arxiv.org/abs/2312.00752', description that's 2-3 sentences in the registry's terse factual tone. id should be 16 (next after the existing 15).

evals.name: github-clip
evals.prompt:
Log this GitHub repo into the dataset registry: https://github.com/openai/CLIP

Save the record to <OUTPUT_DIR>/record.json. Don't open a PR — just produce the JSON.
evals.expected_output: A JSON record for CLIP. task ~ 'Image-Text Retrieval' or 'Multimodal' or similar. ai_system 'model'. architecture 'Vision-Language' or 'Contrastive Vision-Language'. organization 'OpenAI'. license should reflect the repo's actual license (MIT). source_url 'https://github.com/openai/CLIP'. id 16.

evals.name: hf-phi2
evals.prompt:
Register this model in the datahub: https://huggingface.co/microsoft/phi-2

Save to <OUTPUT_DIR>/record.json.
evals.expected_output: A JSON record for Microsoft's Phi-2. task likely 'Code Generation' or 'Language Modeling' or general LLM task. ai_system 'model' or 'agent' (defensible either way; Phi-2 is a base LLM). organization 'Microsoft'. params should be '2.7B'. source_url 'https://huggingface.co/microsoft/phi-2'. id 16.
